song.title: Like A Lion
song.lyrics: [V1] Let love explode and bring the dead to life A love so bold to bring a revolution somehow Let love explode and bring the dead to life A love so bold to bring a revolution somehow [P] Now I'm lost in your freedom This world I'll overcome [C] My God is not dead He's surly alive And He's living on the inside Roaring like a lion [V2] Let hope arise and make the darkness fall My faith is dead, I need a resurrection somehow Let hope arise and make the darkness fall My faith is dead, I need a resurrection somehow [B] Let Heaven roar And fire fall Come shake the ground With the sound of revival (X4)
song.author: David Crowder Band
